NO.D _ 671r /2015 Order with signature of Judge l Date FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 03. I 1.201 5 I Mr. Asfandyar K. Kharal advocate lor petitioner Mr. Saifullah AAG The petitioner was contesting elections as Vice Chairman of Union Council Juna, No.9, Taluka Thatta alongwith the respondent No.3 who was contesting election as Chairman from the said constituency but subsequently the respondent No.3 withdrew his nomination papers with the result the candidate from other side was declared to have returned un_opposed. Learned AAG states that once a candidate is declared to have returned un-opposed then it can only be changed in Election petition under Section 46 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013. The case of the petitioner is that he filed nomination papers alongwith respondent No.3 who without his consent withdrew with the resurt that the Returning officer issued notice that other panel has returned un-opposed. This issue of withdrawal of nomination papers by one o[ the members of a panel has already been decided by this Court on the basis of proviso to Sub-Ru1e of Rule 20 ol Sindh Local Councils (Election) Rules, 2013.

The case of the petitioner is that he filed nomination papers alongwith respondent No.3 who without his consent withdrew with the resurt that the Returning officer issued notice that other panel has returned un-opposed. This issue of withdrawal of nomination papers by one o[ the members of a panel has already been decided by this Court on the basis of proviso to Sub-Ru1e of Rule 20 ol Sindh Local Councils (Election) Rules, 2013. Hence the impugned decision is reversed and this petition is allowed and names of the petitioner and respondent No.3 shall be listed as contesting candi ilL JUDGE F JUSTICE
